title: The Time Watch
description: Adds a stopwatch item that can stop time
body:
[![hosting ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d4ccf68084d5bcd931ec540bbe8cbcc4e51c16.png)](https://affiliate.godlike.host/axolotl-man)



**The Time Watch** is a gameplay-enhancing mod that introduces two powerful new tools to Minecraft: a **time-stopping device** and **throwable knives.** Both items can be crafted in survival mode and open up new strategies for combat and exploration.

# Features:

## The Time Watch:

- **Crafting Recipe:** Place a **Nether Star** in the center of the crafting grid and surround it on all four sides with **Gold Ingots**.
- **Function:** When used, it plays a unique activation sound and **stops time for 10 seconds**.
- **Effect:** This works the same way as running the /tick freeze command — all mobs, projectiles, and environmental events are paused.

### Uses in Gameplay:

- Escape dangerous situations without taking damage.
- Set up the perfect attack without enemy retaliation.
- Pause hazards such as falling sand, lava flows, or incoming arrows.

## Throwing Knife:

- **Crafting Recipe:** Place a **Stick** in the crafting grid, then an **Iron Ingot** in the top-right slot above it.
- **Function:** Can be thrown similarly to a Trident — fast and straight flight for precise hits.

### Uses in Gameplay:

- Great for quick ranged attacks without a bow.
- Ideal for mobile combat styles where speed matters.
- Can be crafted in bulk for extended use in battle.

# Impact on Gameplay:

- Introduces **tactical combat options** — control the flow of battle with time stops, then finish the job with precision knives.
- Adds a **unique survival mechanic** that can save you from certain death or turn the tide of a fight.
- Keeps recipes balanced by using rare resources (Nether Star for the Time Watch, Iron for Throwing Knives).
